name: S-18 consumption trace records the consulted standards source id in the trace per §2.18 schema
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && printf '2026-05-25T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/google-tsguide.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted-standards google-tsguide --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'google-tsguide' trace.json && echo recorded 1>&2
